betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The words from the Undead, their whispers in the True Tongue.
I understood it.
It made sense.
It terrified me.
It disgusted me.
It made me falter.
And yet, I know it to be true.
My True Name. My new True Name.
They knew it. And they spoke it to me.
They made me aware of who I have become.
What the return to Earth made me.
A new truth. My truth.
My Mission, it is not the Arbiter's.
I am of Gluttony. I keep going past what is necessary. 
I never take my fair share. I always want more.
My thirst for knowledge. I could have stopped, I could have been the one to step back. To avoid playing the game of the Meatball Man. And yet I kept going, Terra was not enough...
My journey back to Earth. That changed my Mission.
And worst of all. Now the prophecy of the Arbiter, the words on their tomb. They make sense.
They match my True Name. 
Those who revealed this truth, I tried to annihilate them. I used the full extent of my power. And yet, their recursive forms persists. They now follow me, waiting for me to do what I now know I must...
But do I dare? Do I accept who they say I am?
My True Name changed at least once, can I change it again?
